description:
lib.rs:72-114 only reads param('algorithm'); any other query parameter is silently ignored. URI 'secretx:local-signing:/key.der?algorithm=ed25519&algorthm=p256' (typo on second key) parses successfully and signs with ed25519, masking the user error. Same problem as qth2.6 (file), um3l.6 (doppler).

Fix: iterate parsed.params() and reject keys that aren't in the allowed set {algorithm}. Gated by avkc.4 — SecretUri does not currently expose param iteration.

Lower-effort alternative: document explicitly in the URI doc-comment that unknown params are silently ignored and that the only recognised param is 'algorithm'. This is the weaker option; prefer the iteration fix once avkc.4 lands.
title: from_uri silently accepts unknown query parameters (typo footgun)
